name: cold-start-promotion
description: Multi-fidelity promotion policy for Gomoku cold-start campaigns. Stage A screens, Stage B replicates seeds, Stage C confirms with long budget, Stage D is a handoff slot for v20.3 continuation.

stages.name: A
stages.description: Short-budget screening: quickly eliminate poor candidates.

stages.name: C
stages.description: Long-budget confirmation: expensive validation of few candidates.

stages.name: D
stages.description: Handoff slot for v20.3 checkpoint continuation / branch execution. Not executed in v20.2.
